title: Axolopha maritima
constituents: I couldn't find any reliable information about a plant called "Axolopha maritima." However, I found that Axolopha maritima is actually a non-existent species. It's possible that the name is a mix-up or typo. The Axolotl (Ambystoma mexicanum) is a well-known species, but it's an animal, not a plant. There is also a plant called Axolotl's water lily (Nymphaea lotus) but it is not known to be called Axolopha maritima.
intro: I couldn't find any information on Axolopha maritima.
